name: agents-source-workflow-convergence
title: workflow agents 源定义：收敛 implementation 子代理链为工作流内单一 source-of-truth
description: 分析并收敛 workflow implementation agents 在 docs/workflows/新项目开发工作流/commands/ 内的 source-of-truth、部署适配和迁移边界，产出可执行的工作流内收敛方案与后续实现路径。
creator: xzc
notes: 2026-04-18: current focus is to finish brainstorm/research preparation by clarifying acceptance criteria, migration decision points, and task context before any implementation starts. User clarified that this task must stay inside docs/workflows/新项目开发工作流 and should not move agents to the repo root. Current direction is workflow-local source-of-truth consolidation inside commands/. Shared source has now landed at commands/shared-agents/{research,implement,check}, and workflow install/upgrade contracts read rendered per-CLI adapters from that workflow-local source.
